name: flamenco_chrX_20A
description: Drosophila piRNA-producing cluster: flamenco — master piRNA cluster on X heterochromatin/euchromatin boundary; ~180 kb dual-strand promoter, suppresses gypsy/ZAM/Idefix LTR retrotransposons. The classical piRNA cluster discovered by Pelisson 1994.. Sequence content is essentially a transposon graveyard — dense, layered TE remnants 100-99% identical to active copies elsewhere. Reads here have many off-target placements at active TE insertion sites.
